detail.description: César Prieto flies out to left fielder Billy Cook.
César Prieto flies out sharply to right fielder Jake Mangum.
César Prieto lines out to right fielder Jake Mangum.
César Prieto grounds out to first baseman Spencer Horwitz.
César Prieto grounds out, shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Jared Triolo.
César Prieto grounds out, shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Jared Triolo.
César Prieto lines out sharply to right fielder Lane Thomas.
César Prieto grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. José Fermín out at 2nd. César Prieto out at 1st.
César Prieto flies out to left fielder JJ Bleday.
César Prieto flies out to center fielder Dane Myers.
César Prieto grounds out, second baseman Spencer Steer to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe.
César Prieto grounds out, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe.
César Prieto grounds out, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Nathan Church to 3rd.
César Prieto pops out to third baseman Manny Machado in foul territory.
César Prieto grounds out, second baseman Sung-Mun Song to first baseman Gavin Sheets.
